title: League One - Manager Changes 2025/2026 (Transfermarkt)
text: League One Manager Changes 2025/2026 (Transfermarkt). Planned Changes at Season End (June 30, 2026): Huddersfield Town - Liam Manning to remain as Manager; Northampton Town - Colin Calderwood as Caretaker Manager; Barnsley FC - Daniel Stendel to succeed Conor Hourihane; Rotherham United - Lee Clark as Manager. In-Season Changes: Rotherham United (March 18, 2026): Matt Hamshaw replaced by Lee Clark. Northampton Town (March 9, 2026): Kevin Nolan replaced by Colin Calderwood. Exeter City (March 2, 2026): Gary Caldwell replaced by Dan Green; subsequently Matt Taylor appointed. Wigan Athletic (February 15, 2026): Ryan Lowe replaced by Gary Caldwell after Graham Barrow's interim period. Huddersfield Town (January 17, 2026): Lee Grant replaced by Liam Manning. Port Vale FC (January 5, 2026): Darren Moore replaced by Jon Brady after Jamie Smith's interim management. Reading FC (October 26, 2025): Noel Hunt replaced by Leam Richardson. Peterborough United (October 25, 2025): Darren Ferguson replaced by Luke Williams. Blackpool FC (October 20, 2025): Steve Bruce replaced by Ian Evatt after Stephen Dobbie's interim period. Luton Town (October 6, 2025): Matt Bloomfield replaced by Jack Wilshere after interim management. Wycombe Wanderers (September 18, 2025): Mike Dodds replaced by Michael Duff.
